revision.comment: Replace {{[[Template:CatPair|CatPair]]}} or {{[[Template:CatRel|CatRel]]}} with {{[[Template:Navseasoncats|Navseasoncats]]}} (avoid gaps > navbar size & successive name mismatches)
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Religious buildings and structures by century|10]] [[Category:Buildings and structures completed in the 10th century| Religious buildings]] [[Category:10th century in religion|Build]] [[Category:1st-millennium religious buildings and structures]]

Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:

==Categories==

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
